_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Training and capability improvement involves identifying and advocating ways to develop the skills, knowledge and performance of individuals or organisations.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing data and AI training programs for diverse organizational audiences, from executives to operational staff, with role-appropriate content and delivery formats.
comments: DDaT skill superset of WIDAI OP domain. OP-S-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-S-008 (LS, cosine: 0.601), DG-S-006 (DG, cosine: 0.599).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.8/10 (raw 0.479). Shared vocabulary: [training]. DDaT-only terms [advocating, capability, develop, identifying, improvement, individuals] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, appropriate, audiences, content, data, delivery] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.874 (P=0.882, R=0.866). Balanced P/R — the 20-word DDaT element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Training and capability improvement involves identifying and advocating ways to" and "Skill in designing data and AI training programs for diverse organizational audi" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.500 ≈ STS 0.479 (gap 0.021). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [training] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.9%. Shared tokens: [training]. DDaT-only: [advocating, capability, develop, identifying, improvement, individuals]. WIDAI-only: [ai, appropriate, audiences, content, data, delivery].

signals.detail: STS 0.479 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
